notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG 36-month relative-trend basket from approved card HOLLSTEIN-3YR-2021_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; at the first tradable bar of every broker month, reconstruct 37 consecutive completed month-end closes, calculate 36 simple monthly returns and their arithmetic average, buy the higher-average-return leg, short the lower-return leg, and evaluate the package rather than standalone legs. The source uses at least six of 26 fixed-maturity collateralized futures; the two-CFD narrowing, continuous-CFD return proxy, insignificant two-portfolio source result, financing, gaps, and legging are binding Q02 falsification risks.
